name: Santos de Cartier Medium Automatic
description: The watch that defined the sport watch category in 1904. Exposed screws, architectural geometry, zero compromise on proportion.
patina: The bracelet has light scratches from daily wear. The crown shows patina. The watch tells time and age simultaneously.
whyThisFitsMyArchive: It sits at the intersection of formality and utility. Works in the boardroom and on the wrist while hiking. The mechanics are exposed and honest.
whyIChooseThis: Over Omega Seamaster: The Santos is a dress watch that happens to keep perfect time. The Omega is a sports watch dressed up.
whatItPairsWithInMyCollection: Worn daily. The simplicity of the dial means it works with every outfit without competing for attention.
whatMakesItTimeless: Cartier designed it 120 years ago. The proportions remain unchanged because they are correct.
premiumAlternative: Cartier Santos Skeleton (~₹15,00,000+) — same case, flying tourbillon movement
buyRecommendation: Buy Now (authorized dealer only) — no discounts exist at authorized retailers. The steel Santos de Cartier Medium Automatic is the entry point; confirm model ref. WSSA0009 for the current steel/bracelet version. Grey market pricing available via Chrono24 India.
